jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Quikr
jsonLd.description:
Join the Quikr family as a Frontend Developer in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Quikr:
Quikr is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr!
